about.heading: Hi, I'm
about.name: Amardeep Dwivedi
about.description: Software Development Engineer with 3+ years of experience in Frontend & Full Stack development, focused on end-toend delivery of scalable, high-performance web applications. Strong in JS fundamentals, browser internals & storage, with expertise in performance optimization, secure authentication & authorization, debugging, and Agile-based delivery.

0.title: Notary Platform
0.description: A MERN-based digital notary platform with Admin, B2B, and B2C modules for managing document workflows, secure user authentication, and role-based access control. Implemented real-time video calling using Agora SDK and chat functionality using Socket.IO to enable secure communication between clients and notaries. The platform also supports document uploads, workflow tracking, and user management.

1.title: Institute on Governance
1.description: A government survey platform focused on stabilizing workflows, resolving frontend–backend integration issues, fixing bugs, and improving overall system reliability and performance.

2.title: Edu Smart
2.description: A Learning Management System (LMS) platform with enhanced dashboards and student modules. Achieved around 20% performance improvement through caching, optimized database queries, and code-splitting.

3.title: Accompanied
3.description: A MERN-based social event platform with user management, event creation, and optimized frontend–backend integration. Improved overall application performance by approximately 25–30%.

4.title: Dawa Bazar
4.description: A React-based B2B medical e-commerce admin panel with modules for order management, product management, and vendor management. Improved workflow efficiency by around 30% through optimized rendering and state management.

0.description: Worked on developing scalable web applications using React.js and the MERN stack. Built reusable UI components, improved application performance, and integrated RESTful APIs. Coordinated with designers and backend developers to deliver responsive and user-friendly applications on time.

1.description: Developed responsive and interactive user interfaces using React.js and Bootstrap. Handled API integration, fixed UI bugs, and optimized frontend performance. Worked in an Agile environment and collaborated with the development team to complete project tasks efficiently.

2.description: Currently working as a MERN Stack Developer, building full-stack web applications using React.js, Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB. Developing REST APIs, integrating backend services, and ensuring application performance, scalability, and responsive design.
